amendment.description: An amendment numbered 31 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to require federal animal research facilities to establish procedures to facilitate the adoption or non-laboratory placement of animals once they're no longer needed for research.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Mace amendment (A021) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Mace amendment (A021) Agreed to by voice vote.
